enforce_password_renewal.description: Defines whether password renewal is enforced during first login.

grace_period_duration.description: Duration of the grace period to renew password or enable MFA. (in seconds)

login_attempts_before_locked.description: Number of login attempts before the account is locked.

max_login_session_duration.description: Maximum duration a login session will stay active before needing to relogin. (in seconds)

max_api_key_expiration_duration.description: Maximum duration the `expires_at` field of an API key can represent. A value of 0 means there is no maximum duration. (in seconds)
